name: What if my workers comp for occupational illness gets denied in West Jordan? What next?

mainEntity.name: What if my workers comp for occupational illness gets denied in West Jordan? What next?

acceptedAnswer.text: Request a hearing with Utah Labor Commission within deadlines and bolster evidence.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Appeal the denial through Utah's Labor Commission process, starting with a request for hearing.[1] Common denials stem from late reporting or weak causation.[1] Key factors: Meet deadlines (often 20 days); submit new evidence; prepare for mediation.[1] Gather stronger medical proof quickly and hire an attorney experienced in appeals. Acting fast preserves your right to benefits.

description: Request a hearing with Utah Labor Commission within deadlines and bolster evidence.[1]
